---
name: 🐛 Web Platform Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Catroweb platform. Please DO NOT use this for Pocket Code app crashes or app features!
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**⚠️ ATTENTION: Is this a bug in the Pocket Code or Pocket Paint Android apps?**
If your app crashes, projects load infinitely in the app, or app physics act weird, please report your bug here:
👉 [Catroid Repository Issues](https://github.com/Catrobat/Catroid/issues)

**Describe the Catroweb bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is on the web platform (http://share.catrob.at/).

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop/Smartphone (please complete the following information):**

- Device: [e.g. iPhone6 or PC]
- OS: [e.g. iOS8.1, Windows 10]
- Browser: [e.g. chrome, safari]
- Version: [e.g. 22]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
(Note: The Scratch2Catrobat converter is currently unmaintained and not functional. Issues related to converting Scratch projects will not be addressed at this time.)
